productDisplayName: Nike Men Ath Dept Grey Tshirts
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and grey tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and bold graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colors using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakRemove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wetLine dry inside-out in shadeCool iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry cleanGet ready to hustle in this grey t-shirt from nike.
